data.title: Gold Steady After Two-Day Drop as Iran War Fans Inflation Fears
data.description: Gold steadied after a two-day drop as investor focus remained on talks between the US and Iran, with the indefinite closure of the Strait of Hormuz continuing to heighten inflation risks.
data.keywords: Generic 1st 'GC' Future,Iran,inflation,War,Donald John Trump,Pakistan,Tehran,BBG US Dollar Spot,Europe,United Kingdom,markets
